title: In Too Deep
why_this_song: In Too Deep by Sum 41 (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "instead" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "instead" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "going" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "going" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It took so long for this to die

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It seems that something's telling me

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "In Too Deep" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "In Too Deep", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "In Too Deep" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "In Too Deep" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "In Too Deep", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "In Too Deep", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.
